summary.en: IEC 62933 is an international electrical energy storage systems series often used to organize BESS terminology, planning, performance, and safety evidence. In Indonesia it should be treated as a project specification or engineering due-diligence framework unless it is called up by a contract, PLN requirement, lender, insurer, owner specification, or Indonesian regulation for the specific project. It is useful for integrating cells, racks, PCS, controls, fire response, protection settings, and operating procedures into one system-level safety case.
summary.zh: IEC 62933是电能储能系统国际标准系列，常用于组织BESS术语、规划、性能和安全证据。在印度尼西亚，除非被合同、PLN要求、贷款方、保险方、业主规范或针对具体项目的印尼法规引用，否则应作为项目规范或工程尽调框架处理。它有助于将电芯、机架、PCS、控制、消防响应、保护定值和运行程序整合成一套系统级安全论证。
summary.zht: IEC 62933是電能儲能系統國際標準系列，常用於組織BESS術語、規劃、性能和安全證據。在印尼，除非被合同、PLN要求、貸款方、保險方、業主規範或針對具體項目的印尼法規引用，否則應作為項目規範或工程盡調框架處理。它有助於將電芯、機架、PCS、控制、消防響應、保護定值和運行程序整合成一套系統級安全論證。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62933 series — Electrical energy storage systems
IEC 62933-5 safety-related parts where specified by project documents
Indonesia project contract, lender, insurer, PLN, or owner technical specifications where they call up IEC 62933

summary.en: China BESS packages commonly include GB 44240-2024 battery safety evidence and GB/T 36276-2023 lithium-ion battery evidence. Those documents are battery-focused and should be supplemented for Indonesia with system integration evidence such as PCS interface data, protection coordination, emergency operation, site layout, ventilation or gas controls where relevant, and commissioning procedures.
summary.zh: 中国BESS资料包通常包括GB 44240-2024电池安全证据和GB/T 36276-2023锂离子电池证据。这些文件以电池为重点，进入印尼项目时应补充系统集成证据，例如PCS接口数据、保护配合、应急运行、场地布置、适用时的通风或气体控制，以及调试程序。
summary.zht: 中國BESS資料包通常包括GB 44240-2024電池安全證據和GB/T 36276-2023鋰離子電池證據。這些文件以電池為重點，進入印尼項目時應補充系統整合證據，例如PCS介面資料、保護配合、應急運行、場地佈置、適用時的通風或氣體控制，以及調試程序。

gap.en: The gap is that battery-cell compliance does not equal system-level BESS acceptance. Prepare an IEC 62933-style technical file that links batteries, PCS, EMS, protection, communications, installation drawings, hazard controls, commissioning tests, and operating manuals to the Indonesian project requirements.
gap.zh: 差距在于电芯合规并不等于系统级BESS被接受。应准备IEC 62933风格技术文件，将电池、PCS、EMS、保护、通信、安装图、危险控制、调试测试和操作手册与印尼项目要求逐项关联。
gap.zht: 差距在於電芯合規並不等於系統級BESS被接受。應準備IEC 62933風格技術文件，將電池、PCS、EMS、保護、通信、安裝圖、危險控制、調試測試和操作手冊與印尼項目要求逐項關聯。

mandatory_status.target: Voluntary unless incorporated by contract, PLN interconnection documents, lender or insurer requirements, owner specifications, or Indonesian regulation for the project
mandatory_status.cn: GB 44240-2024 may be mandatory for covered China-market batteries; GB/T 36276-2023 and GB/T 36558-2023 are common technical references but do not replace Indonesian project acceptance

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Use IEC 62933 as the system-level evidence framework for Indonesian BESS projects, but verify whether it is actually mandatory in the contract, PLN review, insurance review, or regulation.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 可将IEC 62933作为印尼BESS项目的系统级证据框架，但应核实其是否在合同、PLN审查、保险审查或法规中被实际强制引用。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 可將IEC 62933作為印尼BESS項目的系統級證據框架，但應核實其是否在合同、PLN審查、保險審查或法規中被實際強制引用。
